checkpoints.name: IDEMPOTENCY
checkpoints.finding: All writes use 'overwrite' mode.
All write operations use overwrite mode.

checkpoints.name: ERROR_HANDLING
checkpoints.evidence: try/except blocks present in main() and run_gold()
checkpoints.finding: Proper error handling is implemented.
No try/except blocks around pipeline stages.
checkpoints.fix: Wrap each pipeline stage in try/except blocks.

checkpoints.name: PARTITION_PRUNING
checkpoints.finding: Partition pruning is applied using 'load_date'.
Read operations are filtered by date/partition column.

checkpoints.name: ROW_COUNT_LOGGING
checkpoints.finding: Row counts are logged after transformations.
No row count logging after transformation stages.
checkpoints.fix: Add logging for row counts after each transformation stage.

checkpoints.name: BUSINESS_RULES
checkpoints.finding: Aggregations are filtered by'status=COMPLETED'.
Revenue is calculated as SUM(amount) WHERE status='COMPLETED'.

checkpoints.name: NULL_HANDLING
checkpoints.finding: NULL handling is implemented.
No NULL checks on primary key and critical columns.
checkpoints.fix: Add NULL checks on primary key and critical columns.

checkpoints.name: BROADCAST_HINT
checkpoints.finding: Broadcast hint is used on join operations.
broadcast() is not used on the merchant dimension join.
checkpoints.fix: Use broadcast() on the merchant dimension join.

checkpoints.name: HARDCODED_PATHS
checkpoints.evidence: Paths are read from environment variables.
checkpoints.finding: No hardcoded paths found.
File paths are hardcoded as strings.
checkpoints.fix: Use parameters instead of hardcoded file paths.

checkpoints.name: SCHEMA_VALIDATION
checkpoints.finding: Schema validation is performed before transformations.
No schema validation before transforming.
checkpoints.fix: Add schema validation to check expected columns.

checkpoints.name: DEDUPLICATION
checkpoints.finding: Deduplication logic is present.
Explicit dedup logic on transaction_id is present.

checkpoints.name: METADATA_OUTPUT
checkpoints.finding: Metadata is written to a file.
Pipeline writes a run summary JSON at the end.

checkpoints.name: IMPORTS
checkpoints.finding: No wildcard imports used.

finding: All imports are present and specific.

top_3_fixes: Wrap each pipeline stage in try/except blocks.
Add logging for row counts after each transformation stage.
Use parameters instead of hardcoded file paths.
